title: Senior Teacher - T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions:
T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions!
